items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Mourinho wants Man City's R...
items.summary: José Mourinho is pushing for Real Madrid to make Manchester City midfielder Rodri his first signing. Transfer Talk has the latest.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: U.S. rebounds at hockey worlds, beats Britain
items.summary: The defending champion United States men's hockey team bounced back from a loss to Switzerland with a 5-1 victory over tournament newcomer Britain at the world championships.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Neymar Furious At Accidental Sub Ahead Of Brazil's World Cup Squad Announcement
items.summary: An apparent mistake by the fourth official has forced Neymar off the field in the 65th minute of Santos' 3-0 loss to Coritiba, the club's last match before Brazil’s World Cup sq...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
